image_dependency: question_text asks which harbor shows the most scouring, which requires inspecting visual content rather than text alone
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the sample primarily depends on the image
image_manifest contains 1 existing PNG asset and image readability_score=0.8954 suggests the visual evidence is likely usable
multi_step: the superlative phrase 'most scouring' implies comparing multiple harbors, not just locating a single labeled item
answering likely requires identifying harbor labels and then evaluating the relative degree of scouring across them
question_text is short and there are no explicit choices, so the reasoning burden appears moderate rather than highly compositional
verifiability: answer_present=true with answer_type='short_text' gives a concrete target response
registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so downstream checking is feasible on the available sample
verifiability is not maximal because this is an open-ended image-based short text answer and wording/label interpretation may introduce some ambiguity
